items.title: roborock’s Saros Z70 robot vac + mop with a five-axis OmniGrip mechanical arm drops to $1,300 low (Reg. $2,599), more
items.summary:
roborock’s direct website is currently offering the advanced Saros Z70 Robot Vacuum and Mop with an OmniGrip mechanical arm at $1,299.99 shipped, which also happens to be matching in price at Amazon. This first-of-its-kind robot cleaner normally goes for $2,599 at full price, which has been frequently kept down at $2,000 since September at Amazon. Following a recurring trend since Black Friday, this deal marks the fourth discount in the time since that it has received a $1,299 markdown to the all-time lowest price we have tracked.
